message:
test(resize): expand simd_scan from 7 to 22 tests and memory_pressure from 21 to 38 tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

simd_scan: edge cases for empty/single-byte input, incomplete CSI at EOF,
back-to-back sequences, all-newlines, ANSI density calculations,
scalar/memchr parity on crafted binary noise and dense ANSI.

memory_pressure: boundary conditions at exact thresholds, custom/equal
thresholds, atomic tier round-trip for all values, unknown tier fallback,
tier ordering properties, exhaustive serde, partial config deserialization,
PaneMemoryInfo edge cases with zero/max values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
